Game: Dino Dini's Soccer 1994 Dino Dini Strikes Another Goal! From the creator of KICK OFF - the best-selling series of football games - comes DINO DINI'S SOCCER, a game so packed full of features and advanced gameplay, you'll still be at it when France kick off the next World Cup! Six different pitch types including snow! Icon-driven menu system. 3 different pitch views. Choice of arcade, league, friendly, or World Cup modes. 2 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/ce202279-1a2b-4d44-9e50-b15f5a581d26.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/c80ba54e-f2c2-4aab-9d3e-0502242a33ff.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/bdaa439e-1b60-4f1c-bf3a-9ca517b9343f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/fe59cfc6-0209-470c-b230-25b5d5991001.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/33b952cc-96c7-4ee1-b690-9c765a13c8d4.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/151163f6-70c2-4bc6-9038-f0b2c9c4c943.png Not Rated Sports Dino Dini Virgin Gamers
